subject: refactor(ui): replace theme prop drilling with ThemeContext
body:
Created useTheme.js — React Context wrapping useDarkMode. ThemeSelector
and MenuThemeSection now consume useTheme() directly instead of receiving
4 props (isDark, toggleDarkMode, comboId, setCombo) forwarded through
App → DesktopLayout/MobileLayout/ReaderMode → consumer.

Removes 12 prop passes across 3 layout components that were pure
forwarders — they never used the theme values, only forwarded them.

App.jsx no longer calls useDarkMode or useTheme — ThemeProvider wraps
the app in AppWithProviders, and only the leaf components consume it.

createElement used in ThemeProvider instead of JSX — hooks use .js
extension per project convention, Vite only parses JSX in .jsx/.tsx.

Tags: ui, hooks, refactor, state
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
